title: Moosend vs EmailOctopus (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Moosend vs EmailOctopus: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between Moosend and EmailOctopus comes down to your specific use case. Moosend is built for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while EmailOctopus targets budget-conscious creators and small businesses.

comparison_table.tool_a: Small Businesses Wanting Unlimited Emails At Low Cost

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on budget-conscious creators and small businesses

faq.a: It depends on your use case. Moosend wins for small businesses wanting unlimited emails at low cost, while EmailOctopus is stronger for budget-conscious creators and small businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Moosend or EmailOctopus?
faq.a: Moosend starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from EmailOctopus to Moosend?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
